name: Yorkshire Pudding with Roast Beef
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 300 degrees Fahrenheit.
2. Cook the rump roast in a 9 x 9-inch pan for 25 to 30 minutes or until the internal temperature of the meat reaches 150 to 170 degrees Fahrenheit.
3. In a large bowl, sift together flour and salt. Gradually add milk to make a smooth batter.
4. Add eggs and beat gently with an electric mixer for 2 minutes.
5. Cover the bottom of the 9 x 9-inch pan about 1/4 inch with drippings from the roast.
6. Pour the batter about 1/2 inch deep over the drippings in the pan.
7. Bake for 20 to 30 minutes. Serve.
